title: Morena Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Morena with a Z-Score of +7.66. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Morena has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0 out of 10. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 25.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is low at 12%, and the wind speed is moderate at 18.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
